articles.title: Centre Extends Footwear QCO Deadline by One Year, Allows Limited Imports for R&D

The silhouette brings the original 1977 Waffle Racer into a contemporary context through a leather and dimensional mesh upper, an exposed foam tongue, and a thin sole that preserves the low-profile character of the original while introducing a material range the 1977 version never had.The construction decisions across the SE reflect a deliberate balance between heritage reference and material update. articles.title: TKG Taekwang Secures Approval for US $54 Million Footwear Plant in Tiruchy
articles.summary: South Korean footwear manufacturer TKG Taekwang India Private Limited has secured approval to establish a Rs. 514 crore (US $53.96 million) mega non-leather footwear manufacturing facility at the ELCOT Special Economic Zone (SEZ) in Navalpattu, Tiruchy. The project, which will be developed on 69 acres of land, is expected to manufacture athletic footwear for global […] The post TKG Taekwang Secures Approval for US $54 Million Footwear Plant in Tiruchy appeared first on Apparel Resources .

articles.title: Dylan Harper's TITAN x Nike Air Zoom GT Cut EP "Daybreak" Pays Homage To His Filipino Roots
articles.summary: Name: Dylan Harper x TITAN x Nike Air Zoom G.T. Cut EP "Daybreak"Colorway: Bleached Aqua/Cashmere/Sport Gold/Chile Red/Metallic Silver/Glacier BlueSKU: IU0779-400MSRP: $200 USDRelease Date: June 17Where to Buy: TITANNike, TITAN, and San Antonio Spurs rising star Dylan Harper have unveiled "Daybreak," the first colorway in the Nike Air Zoom GT Cut EP "DUSK 2 DAWN" series, releasing June 17. The light blue upper and soft gradients on the Swoosh draw directly from a sunrise over Bataan, the Philippine province that is the hometown of Harper's mother, making the colorway a tribute to both his Filipino heritage and the values she instilled in him.The colorway's design brief is specific and personal. articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Max 1 City Connect "Kansas City Royals"Colorway: White/Vivid Grape-SoarSKU: IQ2916-100Retail Price: $150 USDRelease Date: Available NowWhere to Buy: NikeNike has officially launched the Air Max 1 City Connect “Kansas City Royals”. Drawing direct design inspiration from the MLB team's alternate City Connect uniforms, the sneaker serves as the latest installment in the brand's ongoing city-centric baseball series. The pair is now officially available on the market following its scheduled June rollout.The design of the Kansas City-themed silhouette dives deep into local landscapes and alternate-uniform lore. articles.title: adidas Introduces the F1-Adapted CLIMACOOL SYSTEM for World Cup 2026
articles.summary: Summaryadidas unveils CLIMACOOL SYSTEM with vest, jacket and overshoe to combat extreme heat at FIFA World Cup 2026Technology lowers core body temperature and improves enduranceThis innovation joins federation kits, TRIONDA ball and F50 Hyperfast Evo bootsadidas has unveiled the CLIMACOOL SYSTEM, a performance innovation designed to help athletes withstand the high temperatures expected at the FIFA World Cup 2026.Originally developed for motorsport drivers, the system has been adapted for football through extensive testing with clubs like Manchester United, Juventus and Arsenal. It consists of three components : a cooling vest, an insulating jacket and overshoe, all engineered to lower core body temperature, improve heat tolerance and boost endurance. articles.title: The Broken Arm and Salomon’s SAVÁT Sneaker Embraces Handcrafted Appeal
articles.summary: Name: Salomon x THE BROKEN ARM SAVÁTColorway: “Cosmic Sky,” “Black Olive”SKU: TBCMSRP: TBCRelease Date: June 16 Where to Buy: SalomonSalomon is reuniting with Paris-based boutique The Broken Arm to debut SAVÁT, a brand-new collaborative silhouette.Confirmed in two sophisticated, nature-inspired colorways, spanning "Cosmic Sky" and "Black Olive," the SAVÁT draws inspiration from traditional handmade footwear. Each shoe is constructed from a single piece of leather, leaving seams and construction visible to emphasize honesty in design. Elevated through technical detailing, the silhouette is characterized by prominent exposed seams and clean structural lines, while delicate, artisanal embroidery evokes timeless, practical patchwork charm. articles.title: Jil Sander and PUMA Revive the 1998 King Avanti in “Optic White”
articles.summary: Name: Jil Sander x PUMA King Avanti "Optic White"Colorway: "Optic White"SKU: TBCMSRP: ¥88,000 JPY (approx. $548 USD)Release Date: June 17Where to Buy: Jil Sander, PUMAThe soon-to-be-released King Avanti sneaker in “Optic White” marks the third highly anticipated drop of Jil Sander and PUMA following their revived partnership. Originally launched in 1998, this collaborative model serves as a historical milestone that famously pioneered the fusion of high fashion and athletic performance by reimagining PUMA's iconic soccer silhouette.This latest re-edition strips away complex multi-colored blockings in favor of an immaculate, monochrome "Optic White" colorway that swathes the entirety of the low-profile shoe. articles.title: BAPE and adidas Take on Performance Running With Asymmetrical Adizero EVO SL
articles.summary: Name: BAPE x adidas Adizero EVO SL Colorway: Blue/Green, White/GoldSKU: KJ5751, KJ5749MSRP: $200 USDRelease Date: June 27 Where to Buy: adidasBAPE and adidas mark the latest chapter in their long‑standing partnership with the new Adizero EVO SL sneakers. Two colorways headline the drop, spanning a vibrant “Blue/Green” and “White/Gold” version, each offering a distinct balance of athletic function and streetwear flair.Leaning even further into a color-clashing, split-foot formula, the "Blue/Green" variant embraces a mismatched aesthetic. Instead of a white base, the right sneaker is doused entirely in a deep royal blue mesh, while the left sneaker transitions into a rich, dark green mesh.
